query:
SELECT 
  SUBSTRING_INDEX(description, ' -', 1) as descPrefix,
  COUNT(*) as cnt,
  COUNT(DISTINCT customerExternalId) as customers
FROM billing_items
WHERE description LIKE '%Bundle%' OR description LIKE '%bundle%'
GROUP BY SUBSTRING_INDEX(description, ' -', 1)
ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT 
  SUBSTRING_INDEX(description, ' -', 1) as descPrefix,
  COUNT(*) as cnt,
  COUNT(DISTINCT customerExternalId) as customers
FROM billing_items
WHERE description LIKE '%Bundle%' OR description LIKE '%bundle%'
GROUP BY SUBSTRING_INDEX(description, ' -', 1)
ORDER BY cnt DESC
